_meta.notes: penaltyIfNoMetric and penaltyIfPassive are multiplicative factors applied to baseWeight. A value of 0.45 means the effective score becomes baseWeight * 0.45 when the condition is met.

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Elite verb — ground it with scope (e.g. 'architected a system serving 10M users')
feedback.suggestion: Pair with scale, adoption, or performance outcome

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Powerful ownership verb — add a result to complete the story
feedback.suggestion: Quantify the initiative's outcome or team size led

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Strong differentiator — add first-mover impact (e.g. 'first in org to...')
feedback.suggestion: Highlight novelty and downstream adoption

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Ambitious verb — a before/after metric makes it concrete
feedback.suggestion: Quantify the before-state and the result

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Great leadership verb — add team size or project scale
feedback.suggestion: Specify what was coordinated and the outcome

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Bold claim — only credible with a hard metric backing it up
feedback.suggestion: Without a number, this reads as hyperbole; add a % or $ outcome

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Strong verb — add scale or outcome (e.g. 'built API handling 5M req/day')
feedback.suggestion: Specify what was built and its impact

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Strong verb — add a number to complete the impact (e.g. 'reduced latency by 40%')
feedback.suggestion: Pair with a measurable outcome for maximum effect

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Strong action verb — add adoption, revenue, or user metrics post-launch
feedback.suggestion: Quantify what happened after launch

feedback.missingMetricMessage: 'Scaled' without numbers is unverifiable — add from/to figures
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'scaled from 1k to 1M users' or 'scaled team from 3 to 14 engineers'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Ownership-signalling verb — add the result driven (e.g. '$2M ARR')
feedback.suggestion: Pair with a business or technical outcome

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Solid verb — add timeline, budget, or outcome to strengthen
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'delivered on-time and 15% under budget'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Good verb — add the problem it solved or the scale of use
feedback.suggestion: Quantify adoption, improvement, or complexity handled

feedback.missingMetricMessage: 'Optimized' without a metric is nearly meaningless — always quantify
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'optimized query runtime by 60%' or 'reduced CPU usage by 35%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add team size or project scope — 'led a team of 8 engineers'
feedback.suggestion: Specify what was led and the outcome achieved

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Requires a number — how much faster? By what %?
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'accelerated release cycle from bi-monthly to weekly'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add time saved or error rate reduced — automation impact is highly quantifiable
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'automated reporting, saving 12 hours/week'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Quantify what was generated — revenue, leads, or savings
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'generated $1.2M in new pipeline'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add scope: frequency, scale, or reliability improvement
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'deployed 50+ microservices with 99.9% uptime'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Strong technical verb — add scale or performance metric
feedback.suggestion: Specify the system complexity or user impact

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add adoption or downstream impact of what was established
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'established coding standards adopted by 40-person team'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Solid but common — add outcome to stand out
feedback.suggestion: Quantify the result of the implementation

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Great verb for business outcomes — add the dollar amount or deal size
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'secured $4M Series A' or 'secured 3 enterprise contracts'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add number of mentees or career outcome (e.g. 'promoted within 6 months')
feedback.suggestion: Quantify reach and impact of mentorship

feedback.missingMetricMessage: High-impact verb — add contract value or cost savings
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'negotiated vendor contracts saving $300K annually'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Common verb — differentiate with a specific outcome or scale
feedback.suggestion: Consider 'built', 'engineered', or 'architected' if you had full ownership

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Decent verb — pair with adoption or impact metrics
feedback.suggestion: Upgrade to 'designed', 'built', or 'launched' for stronger ownership signal

feedback.missingMetricMessage: 'Improved' without a metric is vague — always add the % or absolute delta
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'improved test coverage from 42% to 91%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: 'Increased' is meaningless without a number — this is the most important metric to add
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'increased conversion rate by 22%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add team size, budget, or output — 'managed a $5M budget' is concrete
feedback.suggestion: Consider 'led', 'directed', or 'oversaw' if you had strategic ownership

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Analysis only counts if it changed a decision — add the insight or outcome
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'analyzed churn data, identifying 3 leading indicators that informed product roadmap'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Collaboration is table stakes — add what the collaboration produced
feedback.suggestion: Replace with the outcome verb: 'co-built', 'delivered', or 'shipped'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Research only matters if it drove action — add the decision or outcome it enabled
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'researched 12 vendor options, reducing procurement cost by 30%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the severity or downstream impact — 'resolved P0 incident restoring $200K/hr revenue'
feedback.suggestion: Quantify the business impact of the resolution

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Always quantify — 'streamlined' without a % or time-saved reads as filler
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'streamlined onboarding, cutting time-to-productivity by 3 weeks'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add number of people trained or skill outcome achieved
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'trained 30 engineers on Kubernetes, reducing ops incidents by 40%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add audience size and decision that resulted — 'presented to C-suite, securing $500K budget'
feedback.suggestion: The impact of the presentation matters more than the act of presenting

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what was overseen and the measurable outcome
feedback.suggestion: Consider 'led' or 'directed' if you had decision-making authority

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Starting something only counts if you can show what it achieved
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'initiated CI/CD pipeline that reduced deployment failures by 70%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what the partnership produced — a shared metric or outcome
feedback.suggestion: Focus on the deliverable, not the relationship

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Vague — what exactly did you do? Replace with a specific action verb
feedback.suggestion: Replace with 'built', 'debugged', 'resolved', or the actual task performed

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Very vague — every employee contributes; say what you actually did
feedback.suggestion: Replace with a specific ownership verb like 'built', 'owned', or 'led'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: This signals low ownership — replace with the actual action taken
feedback.suggestion: Remove entirely or replace with what you specifically did

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Overly formal and meaningless — just say 'used' or replace with what you built
feedback.suggestion: Replace with the outcome verb; listing tools belongs in a Skills section

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Very generic — replace with what you actually did
feedback.suggestion: Use 'built', 'implemented', 'designed', or any specific action verb

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Passive framing — rewrite entirely with an active ownership verb
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'My role involved...' → 'Built...' or 'Led...'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Informal and vague — replace with a precise technical or business verb
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'Dealt with bugs' → 'Debugged and resolved 200+ production issues'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Vague — specify the action and outcome
feedback.suggestion: Replace with the specific technical or business verb that describes what you did
Replace with a verb that shows ownership — 'built', 'delivered', 'owned'
Shows support role, not ownership — use 'built', 'developed', or 'led' instead
Remove — only include accomplishments, not attempts. If you tried, did you succeed? Use that verb instead.
Remove — resumes showcase results, not attempts
'Exposed to' signals you watched, not did — replace with what you built or shipped
feedback.contextWarning: Common Intern anti-pattern: 'was exposed to X technology'

feedback.suggestion: Learning is implicit — focus on what you built or shipped using that skill
List tools in a Skills section, not bullet points — replace with what you accomplished using that tool
Classic filler phrase — replace the entire phrase with an action verb. 'Responsible for managing...' → 'Managed...'
feedback.toxicReason: Job description language, not accomplishment language

feedback.suggestion: Passive and weak — remove entirely, start with the action verb
'Served as' is better replaced with the actual function — 'served as liaison' → 'coordinated between X and Y, resulting in...'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the impact of the diagnosis — downtime prevented, cost avoided
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'diagnosed root cause of memory leak preventing 4-hour outage'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what the bug was costing — downtime, revenue, or user impact
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'debugged race condition causing 2% data corruption in prod'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Quantify the improvement — test coverage gained, latency reduced, complexity reduced
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'refactored legacy monolith, reducing build time by 55%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add data volume, downtime, or cost savings from the migration
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'migrated 10TB database with zero downtime'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the number of systems or the performance improvement
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'integrated 5 third-party APIs, reducing data sync latency by 80%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add user impact or adoption after shipping
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'shipped v2.0 feature to 500K users, improving NPS by 12 points'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add coverage % or defects caught — 'tested' alone is expected, not impressive
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'wrote 800+ unit tests raising coverage from 12% to 87%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the scale or performance benefit
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'containerized 15 services, cutting environment setup from 2 hours to 5 minutes'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add accuracy rate or decision it informed
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'forecasted Q3 pipeline with 94% accuracy, enabling $2M resource reallocation'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add model accuracy, business impact, or scale of adoption
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'built predictive churn model achieving 88% AUC, retaining $1.4M ARR'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the scale of data and the decision it drove
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'synthesized 50K user interviews into 6 persona archetypes shaping 2025 roadmap'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the impact of what you identified — cost saved, risk mitigated
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'identified $800K in duplicate vendor spend, eliminating 3 contracts'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what you evaluated and what decision it drove
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'evaluated 8 ML frameworks, selecting PyTorch and reducing training time by 40%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the benchmark results and what decision they informed
feedback.suggestion: Strong technical signal — pair with a performance figure

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Extremely important to quantify — add $ value and/or number of deals
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'closed 14 enterprise contracts totalling $3.2M ARR'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add number of customers acquired and/or CAC vs target
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'acquired 2,400 new SMB accounts at 18% below target CAC'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add number of relationships and business outcome
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'cultivated 30+ C-suite relationships leading to $5M in renewed contracts'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Critical to add the target and the actual — 'exceeded quota by 134%'
feedback.suggestion: Always show target vs actual when using 'exceeded'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add retention rate % or revenue retained
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'retained top 10 accounts representing $8M ARR through contract renewal'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Highly quantifiable — add average expansion revenue or NRR impact
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'upsold 40% of existing accounts, growing NRR to 128%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add reach, citations, or business outcome of the publication
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'published 4 papers with 500+ citations' or 'published blog post reaching 80K readers'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add reach or adoption of what was authored
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'authored internal design docs adopted by 60-person org'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add audience reach and adoption outcome
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'evangelized GraphQL across 5 teams, driving 80% API migration in 6 months'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what the facilitation produced — a decision, alignment, or outcome
feedback.suggestion: Consider 'led', 'ran', or 'organized' depending on your actual role

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Always quantify — the $ amount is the entire point of this verb
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'fundraised $2.5M Seed round from 12 angel investors'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the company's scale — revenue, team size, or funding
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'founded SaaS startup growing to $1.2M ARR in 18 months'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add headcount, time-to-hire, or quality signal (offer acceptance rate)
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'hired 12 engineers in 5 months with 95% offer acceptance rate'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add team size affected and outcome achieved
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'restructured 3 reporting lines, improving velocity by 2x'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add adoption and impact of what was defined
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'defined OKR framework adopted org-wide, improving goal attainment to 82%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the scope (# of stakeholders) and the resulting outcome
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'aligned 4 cross-functional teams on roadmap, unblocking $1.5M project'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what achieving certification enabled — compliance, contracts, or access
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'achieved SOC 2 Type II, unlocking $4M in enterprise deals'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add scope and findings or improvements that resulted
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'audited 200 IAM policies, eliminating 60 overprivileged accounts'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the adoption scale and efficiency gained
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'standardized API response schema across 8 services, eliminating 200 hours/year of integration work'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add compliance rate or risk reduction outcome
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'enforced GDPR data retention policy across 12 product teams'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the before/after metric to show the magnitude of improvement
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'revamped checkout flow, increasing conversion from 2.1% to 4.8%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what was championed and the adoption or outcome
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'championed accessibility standards, achieving WCAG 2.1 AA across all products'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what was consolidated and the efficiency gained
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'unified 4 data pipelines into one platform, reducing ingestion costs by $120K/year'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add reach, adoption, or outcome of what was written
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'wrote runbooks that reduced mean time to resolve (MTTR) by 35%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the downstream impact — onboarding time reduced, support tickets cut
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'documented REST API, reducing developer onboarding from 2 weeks to 3 days'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Always quantify — grew what, by how much, over what period?
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'grew MRR from $80K to $600K in 12 months'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what was expanded and by what magnitude
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'expanded into 3 new EMEA markets, adding $1.8M ARR'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Always show how much — 'cut costs by $500K' is the minimum viable form
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'cut infrastructure spend by 42% by migrating to spot instances'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: The dollar amount is essential — saved how much? Annually or total?
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'saved $240K annually by renegotiating SaaS contracts'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what was eliminated and the value of the elimination
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'eliminated manual reconciliation process, saving 20 engineer-hours/week'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add who was advised and the decision or outcome that followed
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'advised CFO on cloud migration strategy, reducing 3-year TCO by 28%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Influence without a result is unverifiable — add the outcome
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'influenced product roadmap prioritization, accelerating feature delivery by 6 weeks'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Was the proposal accepted? Add the outcome — adoption is what matters
feedback.suggestion: If it was adopted, use 'implemented', 'drove', or 'led' instead

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what was run and its scale or outcome
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'ran weekly sprint reviews for a 12-person team' — consider 'led' for stronger signal

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what was enabled and the measurable result
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'enabled real-time analytics, reducing report generation from 8 hours to 2 minutes'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the before/after metric to justify the re-engineering effort
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 're-engineered batch job to stream processing, reducing lag from 6h to 30s'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add what was consolidated and cost or complexity reduction achieved
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'consolidated 6 data warehouses into 1 Snowflake instance, saving $180K/year'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add scale or efficiency metric from operationalization
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'operationalized ML model serving 4M predictions/day at <50ms p99'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the scale or reliability metric
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'productionized prototype to serve 500K users with 99.95% uptime'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add sample size and what the validation determined
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'validated hypothesis through 200-user A/B test, achieving statistical significance at p<0.01'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the number of teams and the deliverable
feedback.suggestion: Consider 'orchestrated' or 'led' for stronger ownership signal

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add lines changed, issues resolved, or project stars
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'contributed 14 PRs to kubernetes/kubernetes, 3 merged to main'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add whether it shipped and what it proved
feedback.suggestion: If the prototype shipped, use 'built' or 'launched' instead for stronger signal

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the magnitude of the overhaul and resulting improvement
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'overhauled authentication system, reducing login errors by 94%'

feedback.missingMetricMessage: Add the scale and adoption of what was curated
feedback.suggestion: E.g. 'curated training dataset of 50K examples achieving 91% model accuracy'
